# Sync evidence record artifact

Command-owned sync evidence artifact.

- Schema JSON: [evidence-sync-record.schema.json](../../../../schema/artifacts/evidence-sync-record.schema.json)
- Registry entry: [schema/index.json](../../../../schema/index.json)
- Go type: `github.com/catu-ai/easyharness/internal/contracts.EvidenceSyncRecord`

## Root Shape

EvidenceSyncRecord is the command-owned sync evidence artifact.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `base_ref` | `string` | no | BaseRef is the compared base ref when one is available. |
| `head_ref` | `string` | no | HeadRef is the compared head ref when one is available. |
| `kind` | `string` | yes | Kind is the evidence kind, always `sync` for this record family. |
| `plan_path` | `string` | yes | PlanPath is the archived plan path associated with the record. |
| `plan_stem` | `string` | yes | PlanStem is the durable plan stem associated with the record. |
| `reason` | `string` | no | Reason is the human-readable explanation attached to the evidence record. |
| `record_id` | `string` | yes | RecordID is the stable identifier of the evidence record. |
| `recorded_at` | `string` | yes | RecordedAt is the record creation timestamp. |
| `revision` | `integer` | yes | Revision is the plan-local revision associated with the record. |
| `status` | `string` | yes | Status is the remote-sync result status. |

## Definitions

## EvidenceSyncRecord

EvidenceSyncRecord is the command-owned sync evidence artifact.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `base_ref` | `string` | no | BaseRef is the compared base ref when one is available. |
| `head_ref` | `string` | no | HeadRef is the compared head ref when one is available. |
| `kind` | `string` | yes | Kind is the evidence kind, always `sync` for this record family. |
| `plan_path` | `string` | yes | PlanPath is the archived plan path associated with the record. |
| `plan_stem` | `string` | yes | PlanStem is the durable plan stem associated with the record. |
| `reason` | `string` | no | Reason is the human-readable explanation attached to the evidence record. |
| `record_id` | `string` | yes | RecordID is the stable identifier of the evidence record. |
| `recorded_at` | `string` | yes | RecordedAt is the record creation timestamp. |
| `revision` | `integer` | yes | Revision is the plan-local revision associated with the record. |
| `status` | `string` | yes | Status is the remote-sync result status. |
